summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Human & Natural Environment Society NGO website. Backend: 48/48 tests passed (100%). Frontend public pages: 25/27 tests passed (92.6%). Frontend admin section: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Overall success rate: 97/99 tests (97.98%).

ui_bugs.issue: Interest select dropdown had visibility issue during automated testing, but form submission works correctly (verified via backend API tests)
ui_bugs.note: Backend API test confirmed volunteer form submission works correctly. This is a minor UI selector issue in automated testing only.

ui_bugs.issue: Timeout waiting for 'Blog' text selector during page load, but blog posts loaded correctly and detail page navigation worked
ui_bugs.note: Blog functionality works correctly - posts display, detail pages load, and navigation works. This is a minor selector timing issue.

passed_tests: Backend: All 48 API endpoints (public + admin) - 100% pass rate
Backend: Form submissions (contact, volunteer, partner) with honeypot field
Backend: Newsletter subscription and deduplication
Backend: Donations in MOCK mode with MOCK- reference prefix
Backend: Admin authentication (correct/wrong password handling)
Backend: Admin authorization (401 without token)
Backend: Admin CRUD operations for all content types
Backend: Admin settings, submissions, donations, subscribers
Frontend: Home page with hero, impact stats, program cards, featured blog, testimonials, partners
Frontend: Footer legal registration note (S/26652/SDM/NW/2016) on ALL pages
Frontend: Newsletter signup in footer
Frontend: About page with registration info
Frontend: Programs list (5 programs) and detail pages
Frontend: Gallery page with category filters
Frontend: Donate page with presets, custom amount, monthly toggle, bank details
Frontend: 80G note correctly hidden by default
Frontend: Donation submission with demo dialog
Frontend: Contact page with form and map
Frontend: Admin login (wrong password rejected, correct accepted)
Frontend: Admin dashboard with email not configured notice
Frontend: Admin Programs CRUD (create, update, delete)
Frontend: Admin Inbox with type tabs and status updates
Frontend: Admin Settings with 80G toggle (OFF by default, toggle ON verified, toggled back OFF)
Frontend: Admin Donations log showing mock donations
Frontend: Admin Subscribers list
Frontend: Admin Logout

additional_notes.email_notifications: Intentionally NOT configured - submissions stored in DB with 'not_configured' status (as per requirements)
additional_notes.payment_gateway: Intentionally in MOCK mode - donations recorded with MOCK- reference prefix (as per requirements)
additional_notes.80g_toggle: Verified OFF by default, toggle functionality working correctly, toggled back OFF after testing
additional_notes.legal_footer: Registration note 'S/26652/SDM/NW/2016' verified present on all tested pages
additional_notes.honeypot_field: Working correctly - silently accepts bot submissions without storing
additional_notes.test_cleanup: Test program created during CRUD testing was successfully deleted
